title: T-107 — UI: GateChecklistPanel (gate_checklist_panel prototype) NPD-f slice of T-061
prompt:
# T-107 — GateChecklistPanel UI

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.6 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md gate_checklist
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:106-258 (GateChecklistPanel)
Parent root: T-061

## Goal
Single Client Component GateChecklistPanel: per-gate Collapsible with category sub-headers and per-item Checkbox + Required/Optional/Blocking badges, overall progress bar, footer advance/approval CTA gated by blockers. RSC reads gate_checklist_items from DB; client toggles call toggleGateChecklistItem.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-checklist-panel.tsx ('use client') accepts { project, gates: [{ key, label, items: [{id, text, required, done, by, at, file}], pct, blockers, isCurrent }] }; renders shadcn Collapsible per gate; per-item Checkbox toggles call toggleGateChecklistItem(itemId, done) Server Action; per category renders TECHNICAL/BUSINESS/COMPLIANCE sub-header.
2. Overall progress bar (top card) computed from all items across all gates.
3. Footer Alert: red blocker list or green ready alert; primary advance button disabled when blockers > 0; button label switches to 'Request Approval' when info.requiresApproval is true (calls openModal prop).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/gate-checklist-panel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/__tests__/gate-checklist-panel.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given GateChecklistPanel renders with sample gates, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:106-258, then it shows the same per-gate Collapsible structure, category sub-headers (TECHNICAL/BUSINESS/COMPLIANCE), per-item Checkbox + Required/Optional/Blocking badges, and the overall progress bar — verified by RTL parity checklist using shadcn Collapsible+Checkbox+Badge+Progress+Alert primitives.
2. Given a gate with blockers > 0, when the panel renders, then the footer advance button is disabled and a red Alert lists blocker item texts.
3. Given a gate flagged requiresApproval, when the panel renders, then the primary footer button label is 'Request Approval' and clicking it invokes openModal('gateApproval', { project }).

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/gate-checklist-panel.test.tsx asserting parity (Collapsible + Checkbox + categories), blocker disabled state, requiresApproval label switch before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test gate-checklist-panel'

## Risk red lines
- Do not call DB from the client component (RSC parent provides props).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not enable advance button when blockers > 0.
